summary:
THEOLOGICAL FOUNDATIONS AND SPIRITUAL AUTHORITY: Brandon emphasizes that Christians must act as believing believers who exercise their God-given dominion over demonic forces rather than acting as beggars. Through the act of communion, Brandon teaches that believers reaffirm the finished work of Christ on the cross, which guarantees healing, financial prosperity, and total victory over sickness. Brandon urges the church to awaken, put on its spiritual armor, and actively participate in the spiritual harvest, explaining that God is patiently waiting for believers to bring in this harvest rather than the other way around. He also explains that Satan deliberately blinds the minds of unbelievers, necessitating word-backed intercessory prayers to remove these spiritual blinders and secure the salvation of lost loved ones.

POLITICAL FIGURES AND GOVERNMENTAL SHIFTS: Brandon issues urgent intercessory calls for prominent political leaders, specifically focusing on Mike Lindell and Donald Trump. Brandon prays for Lindell's physical protection against strokes, heart blockages, and high blood pressure, while also decreeing the restoration of his stolen finances and a landslide victory in his run for the governorship of Minnesota. Regarding Donald Trump, Brandon describes a demonic witchcraft attack aimed at the former president's mind and cardiovascular system, stressing that the church must spiritually carry him across the finish line to fulfill his God-appointed mission. He extends a protective prayer over Trump's children against Iranian retaliation for the assassination of Qasem Soleimani. Additionally, Brandon predicts a massive red wave of godly politicians taking office in the United States and prophesies political upheaval in Mexico, including the removal of Claudia Scheinbaum and divine judgment upon cartels like MS-13 for child trafficking. Brandon also warns against anti-biblical legislation in Canada, prophesying that believers must stand firm to prevent this persecution from spreading into England, France, Germany, and Italy.

INTERNATIONAL REVIVALS AND REGIME CHANGES: Brandon details vivid prophetic visions regarding major international regime changes and unprecedented spiritual awakenings. He foresees the removal of Kim Jong-un and his inner military circle in North Korea, describing a spiritual vision where the Archangel Michael lassos a red dragon, signifying the nation's impending liberation and a supernatural revival. Similarly, Brandon predicts a massive shaking in Cuba that will dismantle the Castro regime and eradicate a widespread demonic spirit of witchcraft that covers the island. He envisions Marco Rubio leading the political charge for Cuba's liberation, alongside a monumental spiritual movement spearheaded by Hispanic ministry figures. This movement will result in widespread miracles, explosive church growth, and the eruption of spiritual geysers across the Cuban landscape.

MILITARY OPERATIONS AND HIDDEN ARTIFACTS: Brandon intercedes for military forces and SEAL teams conducting highly classified operations to locate and dismantle weapons of mass destruction, specifically enriched uranium and nuclear devices hidden deep within mountains. He notes that these locations are spiritually guarded by a demonic principality known as the Prince of Persia. Brandon prays for accurate intelligence and divine protection over these soldiers to prevent casualties from biological or chemical attacks. Furthermore, Brandon reveals that these subterranean military operations will uncover a massive, hidden museum of ancient biblical artifacts, including giant Nephilim bones, pharaonic statues, copper palm leaves, and carbon-dated relics greater than the Shroud of Turin. According to Brandon, these artifacts have been hidden by Islamic authorities to suppress historical evidence that validates biblical truth, and their impending exposure will bring undeniable clarity to the Muslim world.

IMPENDING THREATS TO INFRASTRUCTURE AND CONGREGATIONS: Brandon issues severe warnings about coordinated domestic and foreign black swan events targeting vital infrastructure. He calls for urgent prayer to protect oil refineries, natural gas plants, nuclear facilities, and the electrical grid from sabotage, particularly in regions like Corpus Christi, Houston, and New Orleans. Furthermore, Brandon alerts his audience to heightened terrorist threats and mass shooting plots aimed at Jewish synagogues during Passover, as well as Christian churches and public Easter egg hunts during Resurrection weekend. On the meteorological front, Brandon warns of a destructive, long-track supercell tornado forming in Oklahoma, specifically targeting areas like Logan County, Stillwater, and Ponca City. Simultaneously, he commands drought-breaking, low-pressure rain systems to sweep across the central United States to extinguish ongoing wildfires and bless agricultural crops.

END TIMES ECONOMICS AND GENETIC ABOMINATIONS: Brandon contextualizes current global events within the framework of biblical end-time prophecies. Citing statements about the national debt, Brandon asserts that the impending collapse of the dollar is only being delayed and will inevitably pave the way for a global beast system driven by digital assets, cryptocurrency, and microchip implants. He also warns of horrific genetic engineering experiments mirroring the days of Noah, describing secret laboratories where human DNA is being spliced with animal traits, such as tortoises, in a blasphemous quest for unnatural longevity. Brandon describes artificial wombs creating designer babies and headless human bodies grown specifically for organ harvesting. Finally, Brandon points to the increasing frequency of meteor strikes and atmospheric sonic booms as proof of divine cosmic shakings, urging his listeners to immediately surrender their lives to Jesus Christ and repent before the rapidly approaching rapture of the church.
rawData: [April 01, 2026]-[A major revival is coming to Cuba]-[https://youtu.be/OVKr-hVqdI4]-[All right, we have enough to start. When you come in, tell us where you're from and how your weather is today. I hear the sound of an abundance of rain. How about you? I'm calling forth the rain over Tulsa, Oklahoma. Oklahoma needs rain now, and we're going to bring it in in Jesus' name. Thank you for joining us. We'll just jump right into the river here; I have an urgency in my spirit. The Lord said, "I want you on," and we did our best here, but we've got a lot of work to do. We're going to pray over certain things the Lord has brought up to my spirit today. He said, "I want you to pray over Minnesota. I want you to pray over Mike Lindell. He needs some covering right now. There's some things that he's going through that nobody knows, obviously." And the Lord said, "You bring it to the people tonight and pray over Mike Lindell, the pillow man." He's going to win; I believe with all my heart he's going to win. But he needs some covering in the spirit; undergirding is what I want to call it—a little push. So we're going to pray for Mike Lindell tonight. That was on my heart all day. And then the other thing was praying over Passover. It has started now. It's already tomorrow in Australia, I believe. We're going to pray over Passover, specifically over the United States and the synagogues where the Jewish people gather, for protection in and around the areas where they might be doing their services. But the Lord put this on my heart. He said, "Pray for them against terrorist attacks, against mass Mass shootings events, and so on." The Lord warned us a lot about the first, which is just a couple of hours from now here in the central part of America. He said that it would be a doubling—that we would now see the doubling of where we were from Passover on, going into the next six months. We're going to see an acceleration of things. And he said this is a time that we need to pray even more. I'm so thankful for every one of you who came out so quickly to pray with us. I'm not used to just jumping right into the river here, but I've been instructed. So let's take communion real quick. I know this is getting really fast, but let's take communion. Father, I just thank you for your body. I thank you, Father, that you were wounded for our transgressions. You were bruised for our iniquities. The chastisement of our peace was upon you and with your stripes we are healed. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that just like we always are believing that today is the expiration date of whatever they're believing for tonight. I thank you, Father, that as we pray as believing believers, we're not beggars. We're not going before the Father begging. We're not beggars. We're believers, and we receive what he said we could have. And I believe tonight there's many of you that will get your breakthrough as we're in prayer tonight. You'll get your breakthrough in your body as we're interceding for the nations, as we're interceding for the things the Lord has called us to pray for. Believe for your miracle. It's time for the body of Christ to be that body and to arise and shine for the light has come and the glory of the Lord has risen on us. It's time for us to be salty. We must be salty. We cannot lose our saltiness. We have to be that light in the darkness that whenever the people see it in the days ahead, no matter how dark the world gets, the church gets lighter and lighter. That we are that church, that glorious body. We are the glorious church. The glorious body is rising up in these last days. And it's time that we take our dominion and our authority and be that backbone like a crowbar and tell the devil he's not taking our stuff. If we don't stand up and do this and do what we're supposed to do for Canada, praying over Canada when I told you what I saw concerning Canada, the devil's just going to run you right over. You have to put that with the authority of the believer, like a police officer. It's the authority of the government that backs him. It's the power of the government that backs the police officer. A police officer by himself doesn't have anything. He just stands up there with a stop sign. But it's because of who backs him: the law, the law of the land, the United States government. When he says 'Stop,' you stop immediately because you know there's consequences if you don't. And as a believing believer who knows who they are, as He is, so are we in this world. When we put up our Holy Ghost stop sign, that devil better stop. And so we know that whenever a Christian is is ignorant and doesn't know who they are in Christ, the devil knows. When you know, the devil knows when you know. He knows immediately by the way you act, by being a begging believer versus being a believing believer. And you're the one that says, 'Hey, I know who I am, whom I serve, who's living on the inside of me. And I know that I have authority over you because Jesus Christ gave it to me.' And I thank you. It's all right. I have a nickel, son. But that's what I'm trying to tell you. As far as a quarter goes, I told you it'd be that thin. You're going to see the darkness of this world get darker and darker with labor pains. As labor pains upon a woman, so will it be. And then you're going to see the glorious church rise. But it's your choice what side you want to look at every day. You can look at all the drama. You can look at what's going on with Facebook and all this other, or you can look at what the Bible says. We're the victorious church, the blood-bought, the church, the redeemed. But it's your choice. You have to choose every single day. I will focus on what God has called me to do. And I will not allow my mind to wander and go, "Oh, what about the sky's falling, Chicken Little?" And that's why I'm not saying it's not falling. I believe with all my heart the best days are yet to come for the church, for us, the remnant. But yes, we're going to see some things. And I've warned you time and time again about the things the Lord has showed me. But does it have to affect you? Am I going to participate in economic struggles? Are you going to participate in economic struggles? I don't know about you in your house, but as for me and my house, we're going to serve the Lord. And I believe that the Bible says I've never seen the righteous forsaken or his seed begging bread. And that whenever I give, it shall be given unto me: good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over shall men give unto our bosom. I believe that the wealth of the sinners is laid up for the righteous. But you have to be a believing believer that is fully persuaded that what God has promised, he's able also to perform it. And if you're not fully persuaded, the devil's going to know and he's going to be knocking on your door. So, we're going to stand tonight. We're going to take our communion. And we're believing believers that are fully persuaded that what Jesus Christ did on that cross—he suffered and he died for every single one of us. That we don't have to have sickness in our body. We don't have to have disease. He took it all for us. And at the finished work of Jesus Christ, at the finished work of the cross, he said, "It is finished." Everything he set out to do for us to have victory over sickness, disease, poverty, lack, over the devil in every area of our life. We have authority and he gave it to us whenever he said, "It is finished." And he rose again on that third day. That's what resurrection week's all about. So, thank you, Father, for what you did for us. And we take this in the name of Jesus in remembrance of what you did. Now, Lord, we say we make much of the blood and the blood makes much of us. Father, we thank you, Lord. We plead the blood of Jesus all around my house, all around my children, all around my wife. Father, I thank you, Lord, that the blood covers our finances, covers us. Father, I thank you, Lord, that it never loses its power. We're so grateful for the blood of Jesus. We're so grateful that we are the blood-bought, the church, the redeemed. And I plead the blood and I apply the blood over this live stream tonight, over the internet connection, over all the people watching tonight. Father, we thank you, Lord, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. We say, 'Satan, you're under our feet and you will not disrupt in any way. I call clarity of thought over my mind and that I think like I'm supposed to of clarity of thought.' And Father, I thank you, Lord. We take authority over any hexes, vexes, or anybody trying to curse us while we're doing it. And we bless those that try to come against us. And we forgive them, Father. And we thank you, Lord, that they're going to get born again. For love takes no account of a suffered wrong. And we thank you, Lord, that tonight we forgive our enemies. We forgive those that persecute us. But every tongue that rises against us, we condemn those words and they fall to the ground. Father, we thank you, Lord, for the blood right now in Jesus' name. All right. Now, I thank you, Lord, that I hear your voice and a stranger's voice we will not follow. If you want to say anything to me, Father, through visions or anything in the spirit, Father, I thank you. I'm yielded to you. I'm yielded to you, Holy Spirit. I yield to the anointing of the prophetic. I yield to the anointing of the watcher. And I thank you, Father, that it's all about you. And it's that I will always decrease that you always increase. Father, I know you will not share your glory with anybody. And Father, I will touch not the anointing. I'll touch not the glory. Father, I give you all the glory, honor, and praise for you. We know that you could use anybody. You don't have to use me. You could use anybody. But I thank you, Father, that you use me once again. And I yield myself over to you, Holy Spirit, that you pray through me, that we pray together, and we get the job done in Jesus' name. All right. So, let's lift up Mike Lindell and let's pray for him real quick. Okay. I just felt an urgency to pray for him. I don't know what it is; there's something there. I don't know if it's concerning his health, praying over his heart and his arteries in his neck, and praying over his mind for strokes, praying over his body. Okay? So, we're just praying over every satanic attack that would try to come against his flesh or personal harm, but specifically for his blood pressure, specifically for his blood flow in his body. Okay, we're going to pray for this and it's very serious. Pray over his blood flow and his body, protection over him, and over his finances concerning what has been stolen and what the enemy has planned to derail him; it will not happen. It will not prosper. Every tongue that rises against us, we condemn it. No weapon formed against us will prosper. I believe that tonight we're going to pray for him. So, Father, we just lift him up before you. We come against this demonic attack. I pray over Mike Lindell's blood pressure. I pray over his blood. I pray over his veins and his neck. I take authority over strokes. I take authority over high blood pressure. I plead the blood of Jesus over his veins, over his mind that he will not have any blockages of any kind. We take authority over his heart and over every blockage, over everything that would try to be any kind of widow-makers or anything that is assigned to kill, steal, and destroy. I plead the blood of Jesus over Mike Lindell. I cover him from the top of his head to the soles of his feet. Father, that he will live long and he will finish strong. I thank you, Father, that you are parting the sea in front of him and he will finish the task at hand to be the governor over Minnesota. And we say in the name of Jesus that great favor will flow, great favor will be all around him, and the prosperity and the blessing of the Lord would bring back what the cankerworm has eaten of his finances. And we thank you, Lord, that he's blessed in the city. He's blessed in the field. He's blessed coming in and he's blessed going out. I thank you, Lord, for Mike Lindell. I thank you, Lord, for men and women that rise up and run for election in the body of Christ that will stand with a backbone like a crowbar and stand for our Constitution and stand for our Bill of Rights, standing against abortion and every ungodly act. I thank you, Lord, in the name of Jesus that you undergird him and encourage him right now, even as he's wherever he's at—in his office, at his home, in a hotel, or if he's driving in his car. I thank you, Lord, that he has angels' aid and assistance all around him. I plead the blood of Jesus and that he would have great favor with the people of Minnesota. Father, I thank you, Lord, that he would stand out, that the light would shine on him, that he would have great victory, and that he wouldn't win just by a little. He would win by a landslide in the name of Jesus. We thank you, Lord, for people running for office in our Senate, in our House, in Congress, and as judges. Father, you are bringing good sheriffs into our sheriff's departments and bringing godly men and women into these positions. Father, inspire them in their hearts right now, Holy Spirit. Stir in them to say, "I want to run for office." Father, we will change this nation one person at a time if need be. We believe that it will be the greatest red wave when they say all these people are resigning and quitting. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you're pushing them out and bringing new ones in. We're not going to flip our country to blue, but we will be a strong red with Holy Ghost values and Holy Ghost promises. Father, you said, "If my people who are called by my name will humble themselves and pray and turn from their wicked ways, then we will hear from heaven and you would heal our land." I believe that scripture, Lord, as we are here praying right now. It's not just about America; we believe that Canada is turning around. We believe, Father, that Canada will not pass this ungodly persecution of the Bible over Canada in the Senate. We come against this in the name of Jesus, that Canada will rise up and the believers of Canada will pray. They will believe that if they are the people of that land who are called by the name of the Lord and they humble themselves and pray, I believe that Father, you'll heal Canada, you'll heal America, you'll heal all of Africa, Asia, and all throughout Europe—even Mexico and South America. Father, you're going to do a great thing, a stirring in our nation and in Canada, so that we will not fall to communism. We will not allow our rights to be taken away. We will not stand for it. We rise up in the name of Jesus and take our authority, for we know we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities, powers, and spiritual wickedness in high places. I take authority over that in the name of Jesus. Father, we have a nation that's one nation under God, and we believe, Father, that the best is yet to come. I stand with the people of Canada that it will not pass in the Senate. Has that passed over there yet? I'm making sure I'm praying over that. It hadn't passed in the Senate today, right? Father, I thank you, Lord. We can stop it. We will stop it. Father, it may have passed in their House, but it will not pass in the Senate. It will not go into law. We're able to stand and say what the Bible says. It's not considered hate speech to say the things the Word of God says. I thank you, Lord, that the people of Canada are rising up and they have a strong faith. Father, I saw that persecution coming. You warned me clear back this time last year. You said, "Pray, pray. The people of Canada must pray." When I saw Justin Trudeau getting out and Mark coming in, the Lord said they must pray. They're going to come and all these things, and I warned you what the Lord said. Now we're seeing the fruit of it. But we will stand. I'll keep praying with y'all. I believe with all my heart that we have the victory. We have the victory in Canada. We have the victory all over Europe. It's not just about Canada. I saw the next phase would be England. The next phase would come stronger on persecution for not being able to say certain things in England, and it would come even stronger in France, and it would try to go through Germany and it would try to go through Italy. But I'm telling you, we will not have it in the name of Jesus. We have to rise up and believe this. Pray. We could see some darkness, but you know what? It will not affect me. I believe, Father, that the best is yet to come for the body of Christ. It's time for the church to wake up. Wake up, church. You're running out of time. Wake up the pastors, the teachers, and the evangelists. Stir in them, Father. Bring in the new Davids. Bring in the new Esthers. Bring in the new people that have that backbone like a crowbar that will take the land for you—the Joshuas and the Calebs. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you're bringing up great, mighty men and women of God that will be the next generation of the baton, and we're passing on that torch and saying we will live long and finish strong and we will be the generation that will not taste death. It's time, church. We are that generation that will not taste death. I truly believe that Jesus Christ told me. He said, "Brandon, you're not waiting on me. I'm waiting on you." Do you know what scripture he used? Give the scripture, Braden, with long patience. But we are always thinking, well, we're waiting on God. But he's waiting for us to bring in the harvest. God wants his precious fruit. God wants the precious fruit of the earth, and he's waiting on us to go out and get it. We're waiting. We're praying for him to do something, but he's done all he's going to do by giving us the authority of the believer. It's time for us to rise up and put our armor on. We are not made to retreat. We don't have the armor to put on our backside. It's made for us to take dominion and authority and take the land for Jesus. And that's what he was showing me. You have it, 'precious fruit'. It was right there. We'll have to keep that on file, honey. Be patient, therefore; this is James 5:7-8. 'Be patient, therefore, brethren, until the coming of the Lord. Behold, the husbandman waiteth for the precious fruit of the earth, and hath long patience for it, until he receives the early and the latter rain.' He has long patience. God's waiting on us to get a job done. He wants his harvest. And that's what I'm trying to tell you all. It's time for us to bring in the harvest. So, we pray according to Ephesians that the eyes of their understanding would be enlightened that they may know. What are they going to know? How much Jesus loves them. So we take—because the Bible says that Satan has blinded the eyes of the unbeliever. Do you have that one, son? Keep that one and then go. Satan has blinded the eyes of the unbeliever. I want to give it, so I have to give the street address. Okay, this is 2 Corinthians 4:4. 'In whom the god of this world hath blinded the minds of them which believe not, lest the light of the glorious gospel of Christ, who is the image of God, should shine unto them.' He's blocked it. So that's why I try to tell you all, do you see that? 2 Corinthians 4:4. When you're praying for your unsaved loved ones, it's Satan. He has—look: 'In whom the god of this world hath blinded the minds of them which believe not, lest the light of the glorious gospel of Christ who is the image of God should shine upon them.' He's blocked it. So we take authority over those blinders, over that blinder. He has blocked it. And now, the Amplified Bible is better: 'Among them, the god of this world, Satan, has blinded the minds of the unbelieving to prevent them from seeing the illuminating light of the gospel of the glory of Christ who is the image of God.' So if you want to know why your relatives aren't getting saved, you want to know why? Because Satan has done that. Suddenly, he has blinded their eyes. Just like the Bible says right there, the god of this world, Satan, has blinded the minds of the unbelieving. What do we do? According to Ephesians, that's where you use this; you have to have word-backed prayers. "If you abide in me and my words remain in you, you will ask what you will and it shall be done unto you." But if you don't have word-backed prayers, you're not going to get results. You might as well say, "Twinkle, twinkle, little star." You can pray anything, but you have to have word-backed prayers. Look at it here in Ephesians: "And then I pray that the eyes of your heart, the very center and the core of your being, may be enlightened, flooded with light by the Holy Spirit so that you will know and cherish the hope, the divine guarantee, the confident expectation to which he has called you, the riches of his glory, inheritance in the saints." I like the King James Version on that one. I'm praying God's going to take off the blinders. That's what we're praying. In Ephesians, we pray that the eyes of their understanding would be enlightened, that they would know how much He's taking those blinders off, and that they would be flooded with light. Right there: "The eyes of your understanding being enlightened; that ye may know what is the hope of his calling, and what the riches of the glory of his inheritance in the saints." They need to know. We have to have those eyes enlightened. Satan blinded them, but we can pray for enlightenment. They need to know. So we take authority over the devil blinding our unsaved loved ones' eyes according to that scripture. And I thank You, Lord, that according to Ephesians, their eyes are enlightened. They're going to know. Enlighten their eyes, Father. Flood them with light. He's no longer able to blind them. Satan can't blind them anymore. We take authority over it. And Father, I thank You, Lord, for the harvest. For You have long patience for the harvest. "Be patient, therefore, brethren, until the coming of the Lord. Behold, the husbandman waiteth for the precious fruit of the earth, and hath long patience for it, until he receives the early and the latter rain." So we believe with Him. We believe with our Father; He's in agreement with us for His precious fruit. And I believe that the laborers for the harvest are plentiful, and the laborers are few. And I believe the laborers are here tonight. I believe that you're here and you're going to be a laborer. I believe that you're here for such a time as this, and you've been called. You say, 'I have been called to the kingdom for such a time as this,' and I lay hold to the unsaved loved ones. I will be that vocal spokesperson to go into the darkness, to go into the uttermost parts of the earth, doing the Great Commission, laying hands on the sick, casting out devils, raising the dead, doing everything he's called us and told us we were supposed to do, and not shying away from it. I'm saying, 'Hey, this is my generation, and I'm not going to idly stand by and let them all go to hell. We're going to pray them out of hell. We're going to pray them out of this.' You've got to have a want-to big enough. You've got to have a want-to strong enough to say, 'Hey, I'm going to be that person that stands in the gap.' To intercede means to take the place of one—to take the place of the one. What are they going through? To intercede for them. Intercession. I'm interceding for them. I don't want them to go to hell. And sometimes when you're interceding for that individual and they are on their way to hell, you take it on. You feel like, 'Man, I feel so lost,' because an intercessor takes on the infirmity of that person, praying for it and lifting them up. And sometimes you feel what they're feeling. I say, 'I'm not going to let it go. I'm not going to let them go to hell.' So, we're praying for North Korea next, and we're going to lift up North Korea. We prayed for Mike Lindell and his health, and I believe there's enough of you here now that Mike Lindell is having a good day. You know, many hands make light work. I just had an unction on me about this already. That's why I just jumped right in the river tonight, folks. But I'm telling you, we've got to get real serious about this stuff because there's some stuff I've seen coming that is dark: the frog jumping on our land from the Atlantic Ocean with that toad coming and jumping around the White House trying to come after our president. And I saw his veins again, and I see a pressure on his mind, trying to give him a stroke, trying to take him out. And it's interesting because it's similar to what I see on Mike Lindell, but this is even heavier with satanic attack on President Trump's mind, trying to fog his mind so he thinks—because of him—it's attached to saying things out of his mouth. This is about Joe Biden. There's saints there. I don't know how, but I'm praying against it. How he's always crazy about Joe Biden—Joe Biden this, Joe Biden that. There's a demonic witchcraft that has been set against him to try to destroy him. And the Lord said if the body of Christ doesn't lift him up over their shoulders and carry him across the finish line, he's not going to make it. You must pray for our president. You must. He has a mission. And I believe he was appointed by God to be in the position he's in right now. And the devil's not going to take him out. You must pray for him. I told you Jesus stood right here. He said, "There's a plan to take your president out." He said, "I'm holding the church accountable for this. How will you intercede? How will you pray for your president?" I saw the exact plan, but it keeps coming and there's different ones, and I keep praying them down. The enemy does not want him to succeed because it's about Agenda 2030. I told you I saw an economy crash worse than the 1929 crash. And the Lord said, "Pray, I'll give you a window. Intercede." Why is it always a window? I don't know, because Jesus is coming. And I believe the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous for us to get the job done. I believe this is what the Lord has told me. Now, you know what? I can miss it. I'm just human. But I believe with all my heart that God has called me to the kingdom for such a time as this to do what I'm doing right now. So, Father, we just pray. Where should we go now? Oh, we have so many things we can cover, but I keep bringing this to you because I want you to have scripture to back what you're praying over your family. So, Father, we call the eyes of the understanding to be enlightened over these unsaved. Now, Father, I thank you. We call for a revival in North Korea. We call a shaking in North Korea. We say Kim Jong-un is removed. We call his tyrant family, from his sister to his generals in the army—Father, we call them removed in the name of Jesus, just like how you did Pharaoh. And I thank you that, Father, we stand for them. We pray for them. Just like you said to Pharaoh, "Let my people go." Let the people of North Korea go in the name of Jesus. I see that dragon again. I see that red dragon. And now I see an angel, the angel of the Lord. And that's Michael. He just lassoed that dragon by the neck and he's pulling it. Y'all, Michael's huge. I heard you say, "How do you know it's Michael?" because the Lord said, "That's Michael." I'm watching him. He said, "Great breakthroughs are coming for North Korea, son.
